evals.prompt: Register the HikeLog handlers and validators in the DI container.
evals.expected_output: Adds AddScoped registrations for AddHikeLog, UpdateHikeLog, DeleteHikeLog, GetHikeLog, GetHikeLogs to AddApplication() in ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs with full generic signatures, plus IValidator<AddHikeLog> and IValidator<UpdateHikeLog>. Does not create handlers themselves.
assertions: Adds ICommandHandler registration for AddHikeLog with full generic signature
Adds ICommandHandler registration for UpdateHikeLog with full generic signature
Adds ICommandHandler registration for DeleteHikeLog with OneOf<Success, NotFound>
Adds IQueryHandler registration for GetHikeLog with OneOf<HikeLogDto, NotFound>
Adds IQueryHandler registration for GetHikeLogs with IReadOnlyList<HikeLogDto>
Registers IValidator<AddHikeLog> and IValidator<UpdateHikeLog> but not one for Delete
Registrations are inside AddApplication(), not in Program.cs
Uses AddScoped — not AddTransient or AddSingleton
Does NOT create the handler or validator implementations

evals.prompt: Wire up the Stage command and query handlers in DI.
evals.expected_output: Adds the five Stage handler registrations and the Add/Update validators to the existing AddApplication() method, matching the OneOf signatures the StagesController injects. No duplicate AddApplication method.
assertions: Adds the new lines to the existing AddApplication() method rather than creating a second method
Handler signatures match what the controller injects
Delete handler registered with OneOf<Success, NotFound> and no validator
